title: Sprint 37 Issue A+B: BlockMinedEvent handler changes
description: In AgentBackgroundService.cs, update case BlockMinedEvent e: to (1) clear IsInventoryStale flag when a block is mined, (2) call CompleteCorrelatedActionByTool("MineBlock") so subsequent MineBlock actions can dispatch, and (3) add a diagnostic warning when an orphaned BlockMinedEvent arrives with no pending MineBlock correlation. This fixes both Issue A (inventory reset) and Issue B (mine stop after first dispatch).
